question: Does the code pass tests on known problems?
Does the solution converge under grid refinement?
Does the result converge under smaller time steps?
Is there an analytic solution or limiting case for comparison?
Has the simulation been compared with relevant measurements?
Is the validation domain aligned with the intended use?
Are uncertain inputs represented with distributions or intervals?
Are model limitations and missing physics documented?
Can the simulation run be traced to code data and parameters?
